title: Bravo Flight (New Republic)
content:

{{Quote|They're going to have our heads for losing the commodore.|Bravo Six to Bravo Flight|<ref name="Tyrant's Test">''[[Tyrant's Test]]''</ref>}}
'''Bravo Flight''', otherwise known as '''Ferry Flight''', was an escort squadron of at least nine [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter]]s attached to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]].

They were commanded to escort the fleet shuttle ''[[Tampion]]'', which was carrying [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]] so that he could take command of the battle fleet in the upcoming battles against the [[Yevetha]]. In the [[Capture of the Tampion|Capture of the ''Tampion'']], the ''[[Tampion]]'' and her [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|Recon-X]] escorts were pulled out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] 91 [[Light-year/Legends|light-years]] from the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] by the [[Yevetha]]n interdiction Dreadnaught [[Rakehell (Sorannan-class)|''Glory of Yevetha'']] because of information coming from a traitorous senator within the highest echelons of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

The nine starships were attacked by [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], disabling all of them as the [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|Recon-Xs]] of Bravo Flight helplessly watched the [[Yevetha]] commandeer the ''[[Tampion]]'' and hold [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] hostage, and then jump away towards the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]].

Later, the [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] ''[[Venture]]'', flagship of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]] [[Task Force Blackvine]], arrived to retrieve the [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|Recon-Xs]] of Bravo Flight. They were ordered to shut down all systems, and were pulled into the carrier's flight bays by a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]], where they were suspiciously searched. Afterwards, they were debriefed by [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] in a vain attempt to identify the traitor that had betrayed Han Solo to the Yevetha. When they were cleared of wrongdoing by Intelligence, the pilots of Bravo Flight were transferred to the ''Endurance''-class fleet carrier [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']], flagship of the New Republic Fifth Fleet, where half of them were assigned to transfer back to Coruscant, although none were assigned to active combat duty. By speaking to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Bowman Gavin]], the Fifth Fleet's fighter commander, one of Bravo Flight's pilots, Plat Mallar, managed to escape transfer to Coruscant and served as a shuttle pilot with the Fifth Fleet during combat operations.
